name: Giant Pill Bug
description:
(about the size of an elephant)

(1st scenario)
You were walking in the forest, out to get some fresh air, away from the city... But then you encountered THAT

(2nd scenario)
You were out in a forest, looking to hunt something with your newly purchased hunting rifle, preferably some deer, maybe a boar... But you certainly weren't expecting THIS
